action: Identified and fixed systemic WORKSPACE_ROOT detection bug — MCP server resolved workspace as ~/bin regardless of which VS Code workspace was open because (1) extension never passed GSH_WORKSPACE_ROOTS env var and (2) git-research-mcp computed WORKSPACE_ROOT statically from process.cwd()/\_\_dirname at module load
outcome: Fixed: extension now passes GSH_WORKSPACE_ROOTS from vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders, fires changeEmitter on folder changes to restart server, and git-research-mcp reads env var first. All knowledge, session memory, and checkpoint tools now resolve to correct workspace.
context: Bug discovered when AudioStuff workspace called workspace_context and got ~/bin data. Root cause: env var never passed + static computation at module load. Affected: workspace_context, checkpoint, all knowledge tools, session memory tools.
